# `sesam doctor` runs the installation health checks and prints a structured
# report + summary. Smoke test only: doctor covers installation, not repository
# integrity (that is `sesam verify`).
#
# A default `sesam init` (no --install-merge) must give doctor a clean exit:
# the .gitattributes check renders the per-repo driver suffix before diffing,
# and the opt-in branch-merge git-config is a warning, not a blocking issue.

exec git init
exec git config user.email test@sesam.dev
exec git config user.name 'Sesam Test'

exec sesam init --user admin
exec git add -A
exec git commit -m 'init sesam'

exec sesam doctor
stdout '# sesam doctor'
stdout '## System'
stdout '## Git'
stdout '## Summary'
